movies.title: The Drama
movies.review:
Considering the mixed reviews I actually found this to be a fun movie, even if it is (purposefully) painful to watch at times.
Fuck Rachel.

movies.title: How to Make a Killing
movies.review: This seemed like a fun concept but was actually just so boring. I would relegate this to a ‘have 14 hours on a flight and I can’t sleep’ watch.

movies.title: See How They Run
movies.review: How did this movie fly so under the radar? Absolutely stacked cast and plenty of laughs. A very solid easy watch.
